intended_review_use: Zambezi Batoka Gorge large scanned-cliff scale, silhouette, Nanite, and material comparison; South African structure analog only, not basalt authority

source.title: Namaqualand Cliff 02
source.acquisition_method: manual direct official download links exposed by the asset website
source.downloaded_package: 2K FBX plus diffuse, OpenGL normal, and packed AO-roughness-metallic JPG maps

allowed_now: bounded Zambezi comparison capture with baseline restoration
blocked_now: replacing source terrain or surveyed gorge geometry
shipping before geology, guide, art, and performance review

import.mesh_policy: single grounded static mesh, publisher-scale audit, Nanite enabled, collision disabled for isolated visual review
import.material_policy: explicit CC0 diffuse, flipped OpenGL normal, packed AO and roughness; no emissive lift
import.promotion_policy: manual only after paired baseline comparison plus geology, guide, art, rights, and desktop/VR performance review
